normalized_title: City of Melville Local Planning Policy 4.4 - Murdoch Health and Knowledge Precinct
scope_summary: Precinct-specific local planning policy and design guidelines for the Murdoch Health and Knowledge Precinct (MHKP) around Fiona Stanley Hospital and Murdoch Station in the City of Melville. Sets design objectives, a Design Review Panel process for development and building approval, and site-specific development controls (preferred land uses, podium/tower building heights, mandatory and minimum setbacks, vehicle access, minimum dwelling/hotel-room yields and minimum Green Star sustainability ratings) for individual sites such as Sites 1A-1D and 7A-7C. Operates under LPS6 alongside the Murdoch Specialised Activity Centre Structure Plan.

key_numeric_standards.applies_to: podium levels on precinct development sites (e.g. Sites 1A, 1C, 1D, 7A-7C)
tower levels on precinct development sites
ground level to all boundaries, Site 1A (similar controls on other sites with 5-10 m mandatory setbacks to shared/west boundaries)
podium levels to boundaries (5 m each side of shared boundaries unless amalgamated; 10 m to west boundary of Site 1B unless amalgamated with 1A)

key_numeric_standards.unit: m minimum to all boundaries (10 m to shared/west/Barry Marshall Parade boundaries on specified sites)
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: tower levels on precinct development sites

key_numeric_standards.topic: building height trigger for additional assessment
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: Sites 1C/1D - design must demonstrate height does not negatively impact (extracted text partially garbled at this clause)

key_numeric_standards.topic: minimum residential dwellings / hotel rooms / serviced apartments

cross_references.cited: City of Melville Local Planning Scheme No. 6
Murdoch Specialised Activity Centre Structure Plan
Murdoch Mixed Use Precinct Activity Centre Structure Plan

quality_flags: Severely degraded text extraction from a graphics-heavy InDesign-style PDF: bullet glyphs rendered as (cid:120)/(cid:116) with most Design Objective and Development Control bullet text missing
Rotated/vertical drawing labels extracted reversed (e.g. 'YRADNUOB ETIS' = 'SITE BOUNDARY')
Doubled leading characters in headings (e.g. 'DDesign Objective', 'CCOMMUNITY', 'MMurdoch')
No policy number, adoption date, review history or version marker anywhere in the extracted text - 'LPP 4.4' is taken from the manifest, version_date unknown

Site-specific control tables (heights, setbacks, site areas, land uses) are legible, but precinct-wide design objectives and controls are largely unanalysable from this extraction - recommend re-extraction with OCR/layout-aware parser
